creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru p5-Params-Validate.orig/Makefile p5-Params-Validate/Makefile
--- p5-Params-Validate.orig/Makefile	Tue Apr 10 19:46:00 2001
+++ p5-Params-Validate/Makefile	Fri Apr 20 11:32:27 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Params-Validate
-PORTVERSION=	0.03
+PORTVERSION=	0.04
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Devel/DROLSKY
diff -Nru p5-Params-Validate.orig/distinfo p5-Params-Validate/distinfo
--- p5-Params-Validate.orig/distinfo	Tue Apr 10 19:46:00 2001
+++ p5-Params-Validate/distinfo	Fri Apr 20 11:33:42 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (Params-Validate-0.03.tar.gz) = db1b96fdd4cb9905eb3e9c49726eb9d8
+MD5 (Params-Validate-0.04.tar.gz) = 841eb6f98297ace3667b100d9689c131
